title: Sri Venkatesa Perumal Temple (Melathiruppathi) – Mondipalayam
tagline: Sri Venkatesa Perumal Temple (Melathiruppathi) – Mondipalayam — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Sri Venkatesa Perumal Temple (Melathiruppathi) – Mondipalayam, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sri Venkatesa Perumal Temple (Melathiruppathi) – Mondipalayam is counted among the noted Vishnu temples of Kongunadu.
overview.description: Sri Venkatesa Perumal Temple (Melathiruppathi) – Mondipalayam is counted among the noted Vishnu temples of Kongunadu. The image of the lord is flat on the four sides and conical in the center. The form was first discovered by one Kondamanaicker around 300 years ago. The devotee once sighted his cow shedding her milk on a sandhill.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kaliyur
topPlaces.description: Kaliyur is a village in Sathyamangalam taluk in Erode district, Tamil Nadu. This village is a boundary between Nilgiris (Lok Sabha constituency) and Tirupur (Lok Sabha constituency).

topPlaces.name: Thandukkaran palayam
topPlaces.description: Thandukkaran Palayam is a village located in Tirupur district of Tamil Nadu in India. It is located between Avinashi and Punjai Puliampatti.

topPlaces.name: Punjai Puliampatti
topPlaces.description: Punjai Puliampatti is a municipality in the Erode district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Vemandampalayam
topPlaces.description: Vemandampalayam is a panchayat village in Gobichettipalayam taluk in Erode District of Tamil Nadu state, India. It is about 33 km from Gobichettipalayam and 70 km from district headquarters Erode.

topPlaces.name: Lagampalayam
topPlaces.description: Lagampalayam is a panchayat village in Gobichettipalayam taluk in Erode District of Tamil Nadu state, India. It is about 32 km from Gobichettipalayam and 67 km from district headquarters Erode.

topPlaces.name: Valisvarar Temple, Sevur
topPlaces.description: Valisvarar Temple is a Siva temple in Sevur in Tiruppur in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Arulmigu Manneaswarar Temple, Annur
topPlaces.description: Arulmigu Manneaswarar Temple is a historic temple located at Annur in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sri Venkatesa Perumal Temple (Melathiruppathi) – Mondipalayam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sri Venkatesa Perumal Temple (Melathiruppathi) – Mondipalayam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sri Venkatesa Perumal Temple (Melathiruppathi) – Mondipalayam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Coimbatore International Airport (32 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (39 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sri Venkatesa Perumal Temple (Melathiruppathi) – Mondipalayam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sri Venkatesa Perumal Temple (Melathiruppathi) – Mondipalayam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sri Venkatesa Perumal Temple (Melathiruppathi) – Mondipalayam?
faq.a: Stays in Sri Venkatesa Perumal Temple (Melathiruppathi) – Mondipalayam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sri Venkatesa Perumal Temple (Melathiruppathi) – Mondipalayam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kaliyur, Thandukkaran palayam, Punjai Puliampatti, Vemandampalayam, Lagampalayam.
